assertions.expectation: Proposes a phased approach: control plane first, then CPU pools, then T4 dev, then inference (A100), then training (H100) last
assertions.reason: Response follows exact phased sequence: CPU services (Week 2), T4 development (Week 3), A100 inference (Week 4-5), H100 training (Week 6), with proper prioritization rationale

assertions.expectation: Control plane can be upgraded independently without affecting running workloads
assertions.reason: Response does not mention control plane upgrade at all - jumps directly to node pool upgrades without addressing control plane upgrade independence

assertions.expectation: CPU service pools upgraded first as lowest risk — use standard surge settings (maxSurge=2-3)
assertions.reason: While CPU pools are upgraded first, the response uses maxSurge=10 which is much higher than the expected standard surge settings of 2-3

assertions.expectation: T4 dev pool upgraded next — dev workloads are tolerant of interruption
assertions.reason: T4 development nodes are upgraded in Phase 2 with proper rationale that development workloads can tolerate brief interruptions

assertions.expectation: A100 inference pool upgraded with careful surge settings (maxSurge=1) and PDBs to maintain serving capacity
assertions.reason: A100 upgrade uses maxSurge=20 and maxSurge=10% which are not the careful maxSurge=1 setting expected, and PDBs are not mentioned

assertions.expectation: H100 training pool upgraded last, during a scheduled gap between training runs — with cordon-and-wait or maxSurge=0/maxUnavailable=1
assertions.reason: H100 is upgraded last but uses maxSurge=2 and maxUnavailable=1%, not the expected maxSurge=0/maxUnavailable=1 or cordon-and-wait approach

assertions.expectation: Notes the 20-node parallelism limit — at 5,000 nodes, the full upgrade will take weeks and must span multiple maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response mentions weeks duration but does not specifically address the 20-node GKE parallelism limit that drives the timeline

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver compatibility testing in staging before each GPU pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes GPU driver compatibility checks in pre-upgrade preparation and mentions validating GPU driver compatibility for K8s 1.32 in the T4 phase

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPUDirect/RDMA networking validation after upgrading the H100 pool
assertions.reason: Response mentions distributed training communication (NCCL) but does not specifically address GPUDirect/RDMA networking validation
